![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/2314692f-be6e-4368-afe0-c3d90817fef7/Rich+%26+Rare+-+Markus+Ravik+-+124.jpg)

# LUNCH & DINNER

From the bountiful oceans and farms of Queensland to the acclaimed cattle paddocks of Japan, our Chefs have rounded up the finest produce to create this exceptional menu. For the perfect accompaniments, please don’t hesitate to ask your waiter for recommendations of wines, whiskeys, and cocktails.

## SNACKS

## OYSTERS

## COLD SEAFOOD

## ENTRÈE

## LARGE PLATES

## STONE AXE BOARD

## CLASSIC SIDES

## R&R SIDES

## Sauces

## EXTRAS

## BANQUETS

_Whole table only, minimum two people_

#### **DrOVer’s delight - 88pp**

**Artisan Sourdough Ciabatta**

_Bone marrow butter_

**Jamón Ibérico**

_EVOO_

**Raw Salmon**

_Ceviche, crispy sweet potato, salmon roe, green oil_

**Wagyu Bites & Kiss Pepper Jam**

_MB9+ Chuck Eye Roll, panko crumbed_

**400g Black Angus Sirloin MB4+**

_270+ days grain fed, Portoro Black Angus, British and Euro Bred Black Angus, Riverina Region, Southern NSW • Chimichurri_

**Iceberg Lettuce**

_Lemon, shaved parmesan_

**Shoestring Fries**

_Rosemary salt, aioli_

**Coconut Panna Cotta**

_Dried edible flowers, strawberry, silky mango sauce_

#### **Wave & Wagyu - 132pp**

**Artisan Sourdough Ciabatta** _Bone marrow butter_

**Jamón Ibérico**

_EVOO_

**Westholme Wagyu Tartare - MB4-5 Petit Tender**

_Yolk, fresh horseradish, homemade potato crisps_

**King Prawns**

_Corn purée, homemade sweet chilli jam_

**Market Fish**

_Ask your waiter about our market fish_

**Tajima Wagyu Striploin MB6-7**

_400+ day grain fed Wagyu from Tajima bloodline cattle of Hyogo Prefecture in Japan, crossbred with Angus/Holstein, F1-F4, and raised in Australia, Riverina Region, NSW • Chimichurri_

**Wagyu Fat Potatoes**

_Gremolata, wagyu fat_

**GreenBeans**

_Goat curd, chilli_

**Chocolate**

_Cocoa crumble, macadamia ice cream, meringue crackers, black flake salt_

![Empty white background.](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/63dc8452-3dec-4d78-b3ee-33439cd1168c/RAR45_M+Cup+Tile_V2.png)

#### **R&R EXPERIENCE - 220pp**

**Artisan Sourdough Ciabatta** _Bone marrow butter_

**Wagyu Tataki - MB8-9** _Rump, ponzu, wakame_

**King Prawns** _Corn purée, homemade sweet chilli jam_

**Westholme Wagyu Tartare MB4-5 Petit Tender** _Yolk, fresh horseradish, homemade potato crisps_

**Scotch Fillet** _150+ days grain fed, Riverina, full blood Black Angus,_

_Glen Innes, New England Tablelands, NSW_

**Tajima Wagyu Striploin MB6-7** _300+ day grain fed Wagyu from Tajima bloodline cattle of Hyogo Prefecture in Japan, crossbred with Angus/Holstein, F1-F4, and raised in Australia, Riverina Region, NSW_

**Striploin A5 Japanese Wagyu MB12+** _650+ days grain fed, 100% full blood A5 Japanese Black Wagyu, Kagoshima Japan_

**R&R Red Wine Jus**

**Bone Marrow Mash**

**Green Beans**

**Shoestring Fries**

**Mixed Leaf Salad**

**R&R Cheesecake**

**ADD ONS**

Fried Egg **5** Foie Gras **40** King Prawn **12** Whole Live Lobster **240** Blue Cheese **10**

_Kids menu available upon request._

_10% Weekend surcharge (20% on public holidays). Card payment surcharge applies._

_Please advise wait staff of any dietary requirements or allergies. Needs are catered for to the best of our ability, but the decision to consume a meal is the responsibility of the diner. Nuts, seafood, shellfish, sesame seeds, wheat, flour, eggs, fungi & dairy products are all handled on these premises._

­

­

![DSC02585.JPG](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/645aeb6e5e03ca278fcc244b/20d6f35c-7cc1-41ac-8bd7-a8b545435a0a/DSC02585.JPG)

# MOTHER'S DAY DINING

Because Mum deserves a day as special as she is!

**Sunday 10th of May.**

- [BOOK NOW](https://www.sevenrooms.com/explore/richandrarerestaurant/reservations/create/search?date=2026-05-10&venues=richandrarerestaurant%2Cpompetteau%2Cdarkshepherd%2Cyamasgreekdrink%2Cstilts%2Cfatcowrestaurant%2Clongwangchopstickhouse%2Copabarmezze%2Cmassimorestaurantandbar%2Cfoshbarrestaurant)
